title: pyrus eminens
intro: Pyrus eminens is a rare, deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family and commonly known as the Chinese wild pear or Chinese mountain ash. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus eminens include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pyrus eminens include tea, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
